recipe.title: Sicilian spaghetti alla Norma
recipe.description: Packed with flavour this Italian pasta dish, spaghetti alla Norma, is well worth a try. Topped with pecorino, it's comfort food at its best. Get stuck in!

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh basil

steps.descr: Chop the aubergines into rough 2cm chunks
steps.instructions: Chop the aubergines into rough 2cm chunks. Place into a colander in the sink, sprinkle with sea salt to draw out the moisture, then set aside for around 20 minutes.

on_enter.say: Chop the aubergines into rough 2cm chunks. Place into a colander in the sink, sprinkle with sea salt to draw out the moisture, then set aside for around 20 minutes.

steps.descr: Peel and finely slice the garlic, then pick the basil...
steps.instructions: Peel and finely slice the garlic, then pick the basil leaves and finely slice the stalks.

on_enter.say: Peel and finely slice the garlic, then pick the basil leaves and finely slice the stalks.

steps.descr: Rinse the aubergine and pat dry with kitchen paper, then...
steps.instructions: Rinse the aubergine and pat dry with kitchen paper, then place into a large bowl with the oregano, chilli flakes, a splash of olive oil and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper. Toss together well.

on_enter.say: Rinse the aubergine and pat dry with kitchen paper, then place into a large bowl with the oregano, chilli flakes, a splash of olive oil and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper. Toss together well.

steps.descr: Drizzle a splash of olive oil into a large frying pan...
steps.instructions: Drizzle a splash of olive oil into a large frying pan over a medium heat. Once hot, add the aubergines in a single layer, and fry for 5 to 8 minutes, or until softened and golden, stirring occasionally – you may need to do this in batches.

on_enter.say: Drizzle a splash of olive oil into a large frying pan over a medium heat. Once hot, add the aubergines in a single layer, and fry for 5 to 8 minutes, or until softened and golden, stirring occasionally – you may need to do this in batches.

steps.descr: Add another splash of olive oil, followed by the garlic,...
steps.instructions: Add another splash of olive oil, followed by the garlic, capers and basil stalks, then cook for a further 2 minutes, or until golden.

on_enter.say: Add another splash of olive oil, followed by the garlic, capers and basil stalks, then cook for a further 2 minutes, or until golden.

steps.descr: Stir in the vinegar and the tomatoes, breaking them up...
steps.instructions: Stir in the vinegar and the tomatoes, breaking them up with the back of a spoon. Reduce the heat to low, and simmer gently for 15 to 20 minutes, or until thick and glossy.

on_enter.say: Stir in the vinegar and the tomatoes, breaking them up with the back of a spoon. Reduce the heat to low, and simmer gently for 15 to 20 minutes, or until thick and glossy.

steps.descr: Cook the spaghetti in a pan of boiling salted water for...
steps.instructions: Cook the spaghetti in a pan of boiling salted water for 8 minutes or until al dente, which means that it should be soft enough to eat, but still have a bit of bite and firmness to it.

on_enter.say: Cook the spaghetti in a pan of boiling salted water for 8 minutes or until al dente, which means that it should be soft enough to eat, but still have a bit of bite and firmness to it.

steps.descr: Drain the spaghetti, reserving a cupful of the cooking...
steps.instructions: Drain the spaghetti, reserving a cupful of the cooking water, then add a good splash of the reserved water to the aubergine sauce.

on_enter.say: Drain the spaghetti, reserving a cupful of the cooking water, then add a good splash of the reserved water to the aubergine sauce.

steps.descr: Finely grate in half the cheese and tear in most of the...
steps.instructions: Finely grate in half the cheese and tear in most of the reserved basil leaves. Add a lug of extra virgin olive oil, then season to taste.

on_enter.say: Finely grate in half the cheese and tear in most of the reserved basil leaves. Add a lug of extra virgin olive oil, then season to taste.

steps.descr: Add the spaghetti to the sauce and toss well, adding an...
steps.instructions: Add the spaghetti to the sauce and toss well, adding an extra splash of the reserved cooking water to loosen, if needed.

on_enter.say: Add the spaghetti to the sauce and toss well, adding an extra splash of the reserved cooking water to loosen, if needed.

steps.descr: Divide between bowls, grate over the remaining cheese...
steps.instructions: Divide between bowls, grate over the remaining cheese and finish with the remaining basil scattered on top.

on_enter.say: Divide between bowls, grate over the remaining cheese and finish with the remaining basil scattered on top.
